case_title: BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC VS ONIA, BETTY C.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $271.00 FILED BY BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC AS TO DEFENDANT ONIA, BETTY C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
